title: Signup (Email + OTP)
description: New user registers with email and password, verifies via 6-digit OTP code, and gets a session. Includes invite auto-accept, cart merge, and recently-viewed merge as background side effects.

flows.title: Register & Verify Email
flows.trigger: User clicks Sign Up in navbar modal

steps.label: User clicks Sign Up → navbar modal opens
Enter email + password
steps.notes: Client-side validation: email format, password min 8 chars.

steps.label: POST /api/auth/register (admin client creates user)
steps.notes: Uses admin client to create user, bypassing email confirmation flow. Triggers Supabase to send OTP email.

steps.label: Form transitions to OTP input (same modal, no page change)
verifyOtp(type='signup') → session established
steps.notes: On success, Supabase sets session cookies.

steps.label: Check if invite token was present in URL params
steps.notes: Token was stored in Navbar state from ?register=true&invite={token}. Threaded to OtpInput via props.

steps.label: acceptShopInvite(token) — join shop automatically
steps.notes: Only fires if invite token present. Failure never blocks — account is always created. See shop-invite-acceptance.json for full flow.

steps.label: useCartMerge() — merge localStorage cart to DB
steps.notes: Silent. No toast. Fires on any auth state change. See guest-cart.json for full flow.

steps.label: useRecentlyViewedMerge() — merge localStorage views to DB
Check onboarding_completed_at on member record
steps.notes: If null → onboarding banner appears. If set → user stays on current page.
